---
title: "Introduction to Positron and AI"
format: html
---

# Sections:
<p>



# Sources and References

YouTube Videos:<p>
. Installlation and set-up of Positron IDE:
.. [Positron IDE for R & Python | How to Install & Use | Better than RStudio? (Statistics Globe)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VPHuCl8asjQ&list=PLnORDsS8KLUe9bn-sBHSGCJE2TffgqDdo&index=9&t=1s)<p>
.. [First look at Positron, exploring orca encounters (by Julia Silge, Posit)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5BojM5EciPs)<p>
. AI features in Positron:<p>
.. [How to use Positron's GitHub integration (Posit)]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JTv4IbFzI7M&list=PLnORDsS8KLUe9bn-sBHSGCJE2TffgqDdo&index=2)https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ndq2Mm3Dju8&list=PLnORDsS8KLUe9bn-sBHSGCJE2TffgqDdo&index=7https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JTv4IbFzI7M&list=PLnORDsS8KLUe9bn-sBHSGCJE2TffgqDdo&index=2)<p>
.. [AI-Powered Data Science in Positron (Posit)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TrN-FMcOsOA&list=PLnORDsS8KLUe9bn-sBHSGCJE2TffgqDdo&index=5)<p>
